# IGRP React Framework

IGRP is a React framework using:

- React 19
- Next.js 15
- react-hook-form
- zod
- TailwindCSS v4
- Radix UI (via @igrp/igrp-framework-react-design-system)

## Component Rules

Always use IGRP components instead of raw HTML.

❌ Do not use:
<input />
<button />
<select />
<textarea />

✅ Use:
<IGRPInputText />
<IGRPButton />
<IGRPSelect />
<IGRPTextarea />

## Import Path

import { ... } from '@igrp/igrp-framework-react-design-system';

## Forms

Forms must use:

- IGRPForm
- IGRPFormField
- react-hook-form (via IGRPForm)
- zod schema

Example:

<IGRPForm schema={schema} onSubmit={onSubmit}>
  <IGRPFormField name="name" label="Name" required>
    <IGRPInputText name="name" />
  </IGRPFormField>
</IGRPForm>

## Tables

Tables must use:

- IGRPDataTable (for data with columns, sorting, filtering)
- IGRPTable (for simple static tables)

Example:

<IGRPDataTable columns={columns} data={data} />

## AI Resources

- Component specs: docs/ai/components/
- Component registry: packages/design-system/ai/components.json
- Examples: examples/
- Skills: .ai/skills/ and .cursor/skills/igrp-design-system/
